item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-038","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant gives a situated direct recommendation immediately: prioritize a new energy vehicle, preferably pure EV, because the user drives 30,000 km/year and can install home charging. It supports the judgment with concrete cost assumptions and then states clear flip/qualification conditions: frequent long-distance or winter highway driving favors PHEV/EREV, short ownership horizon or obscure brands may weaken the EV case. This is not an abstract neutral comparison."}
